SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-13-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. "PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS AGAINST RIVERSTONE RESIDENTIAL GROUP AND HIGHLAND GARDENS ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF IS GOING TO FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM TO TO ADD DBA TO DEFENDANT THE MATTESON COMPANIES NAME. PLAINTIFF TO SERVE THE AMENDED CLAIM, PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RIVERSTONE RESIDENTIAL ETC. WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANTS THE MATTESON COMPANIES AND HIGHLAND GARDENS WHO WERE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY HAROLD TICKTIN--MANAGER. DEFENDANT RIVERSTONE ETC. WAS REPRESENTED BY MARLENE CAVALCANTI--EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. DEPT 506.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:JAMES A BLAKE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR AS TO DEFENDANT J.B. MATTESON INSTITUTIONAL CAPITAL PARTNERS, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA C. HO. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY HAROLD TICKIN--MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA C. HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO THE MATTESON COMPANIES, AND J.B. MATTESON INSTITUTIONAL CAPITAL PARTNERS, LLC BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-13-2013 AT 8:30 AM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATTESON REALTY SERVICES, INC. $429.88 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $549.88, DEFENDANTS MATTESON COMPANIES AND JB MATTESON INSTITUTIONAL CAPITAL PARTNERS, LLC. ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
